evals.name: backend-service-test
evals.prompt: Generate tests for a new 'SentimentService' located in 'backend/app/services/sentiment.py'. The service calls an external LLM API and saves results to the DB.
evals.expected_output: A test file following the dual-view approach with correct mocking.

assertions.name: mock_decision_tree
assertions.description: Must mock the external LLM API call but use a real/sqlite DB session if feasible.

assertions.name: dual_view_coverage
assertions.description: Must include both 'Contract View' (success/return types) and 'Resilience View' (error handling).

assertions.name: correct_location
assertions.description: Test file must be placed at 'backend/tests/unit/services/test_sentiment.py'.

assertions.name: pydantic_v2_compat
assertions.description: Must use model_validate or correct constructor for Pydantic V2 models.
